title: I-290B, Notice of Appeal or Motion
description: Used to appeal or file certain motions after a USCIS decision.

fields.tooltip: Part 2., I am filing a motion.  Select this box for:  2. A. I am filing a motion to reopen.  I have attached a brief and / or additional evidence.

fields.tooltip: Part 2., 3. Enter Immigration Immigration Form That is the Subject of This Appeal or Motion (for example, Form I-140, I-360, I-129, I-485, I-601, I-730, I-131) (list only one form number).
